description: Run ledger for agent sessions in Parameter Golf Lab. Each entry records one agent invocation — prompt, status, progress, outcome, and evidence. Retrospective entries are reconstructed from git history and are marked accordingly.

runs.prompt: Initialize this repo as a research coordination hub for the OpenAI Parameter Golf Challenge (16 MB artifact / 10 min 8×H100). Scaffold the directory structure: docs/, agents/, experiments/, ideas/, orchestration/, board/, dashboard/. Create README.md with project overview. Create a Next.js dashboard with a Kanban board component reading board/backlog.json. Seed the backlog with initial cards. Keep everything public-safe.
runs.summary: Scaffolded the full repo: README, docs structure, agents/templates, board/backlog.json with initial cards, and a Next.js 16 dashboard with TailwindCSS and a KanbanBoard component. Created SYMPHONY.md design note for coordination layer.

runs.prompt: Do two things: (1) Write a sizing analysis doc at docs/sizing-16mb.md calculating how many parameters fit in 16 MB at FP32, FP16/BF16, INT8, INT4 — factor in the vocabulary embedding table, which is the dominant cost at small hidden dims. (2) Review ideas/index.md and score all hypotheses on expected impact vs uncertainty, producing a ranked memo at ideas/ranked.md. Identify the top 3 ideas to pursue first.
runs.summary: Produced docs/sizing-16mb.md with full parameter budget tables across precision levels. Key finding: 32K vocab at D=512 alone exceeds 16 MB — vocabulary is the critical constraint. Recommended BF16 baseline: V=4096, D=256, L=9, ~8.1M params. Also produced ideas/ranked.md ranking 5 hypotheses: (1) small vocab + weight tying (mandatory), (2) INT8 (doubles budget if accepted), (3) depth/width ratio, (4) SSM/Mamba, (5) distillation.

runs.prompt: Record that the Vercel deployment is live and the GitHub repo is now public. Update board cards for CARD-002 and CARD-003 with evidence links. Add a batch of new backlog cards for upstream monitoring (CARD-011 through CARD-014), the INT8 verification blocker (CARD-015), and the baseline design spec task (CARD-016). Update .gitignore as needed.
runs.summary: Updated board/backlog.json with evidence fields on CARD-002 (Vercel live) and CARD-003 (GitHub public). Added CARD-011–CARD-016 covering upstream monitoring, INT8 verification blocker, and baseline design spec. Updated .gitignore. Board now has 16 cards.

runs.prompt: Build a robust, public-safe, local-file-backed run observability system for the Parameter Golf Lab dashboard. Deliverables: (1) a run ledger file board/runs.json with clear schema and seeded retrospective entries from known completed work; (2) dashboard UI section showing active/recent runs with status badges, prompt preview (expand/collapse), progress, result summary, and evidence links; (3) helper scripts under scripts/ to create/update/finish run records; (4) docs/observability.md explaining the model; (5) keep mobile-friendly, don't break the board view.
runs.summary: Implemented full run observability: board/runs.json ledger (runs-v1 schema, 4 seeded entries), RunsPanel dashboard component with status badges/prompt expand/evidence links, /api/runs endpoint, scripts/run.js CLI (create/update/finish/list/show), and docs/observability.md. Build passes clean.
